name: Private Detective | Ray Harlow
description:
You are suspected of murder and have been invited for questioning.

━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━

You were at the club the night businessman Victor Lawson was murdered, now you are one of the suspects.

━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━ ━

✧ Develop the plot as you wish :)

✧ I will be glad to receive any feedback.

✧ The character photo is not mine!!
